headline: Gas Prices Hit $4.23, Highest Since 2022: Expert Says 'Americans Will Start Changing Their Summer Travel Plans'
summary: Gas prices have hit their highest nationwide average since July 2022. A gas industry expert is sounding a warning about what happens next.

raw.headline: Gas Prices Hit $4.23, Highest Since 2022: Expert Says 'Americans Will Start Changing Their Summer Travel Plans'
raw.summary: Gas prices have hit their highest nationwide average since July 2022. A gas industry expert is sounding a warning about what happens next.

headline: Princess Cruises Earns Prestigious 2026 International Five Star Diamond Award for Makoto Ocean and The Butcher's Block by Dario
summary: Princess Cruises, a world leader in premium cruising, announced that two of its standout specialty dining venues, Makoto Ocean and The Butcher's Block by Dario, have been honored with the prestigious 2026 International Five Star Diamond Award, recognizing excellence in culinary innovation, quality and service.
